beginner.title: Sum of Array Elements
beginner.description: Write a program to calculate the sum of all elements in a given array.

beginner.title: Find Maximum in Array
beginner.description: Write a program to find the maximum number in an array.

beginner.title: Reverse a String
beginner.description: Write a function that reverses a given string.

intermediate.title: Find Element Ratio
intermediate.description: Given an array, find the ratio of positive, negative, and zero elements (return as three decimal values with six places after the decimal).

intermediate.title: Find Missing Number
intermediate.description: Given an array of size n-1 containing distinct numbers from 1 to n, find the missing number.

intermediate.title: Recursive Factorial
intermediate.description: Write a recursive function to compute the factorial of a number.

advanced.title: Maximum Subarray Sum
advanced.description: Given an array, find the contiguous subarray with the maximum sum (Kadane's algorithm).

advanced.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
advanced.description: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

advanced.title: Find All Anagrams
advanced.description: Given a string and a pattern, find all starting indices of the pattern's anagrams in the string.
